title: Mass Reassign Items to Another User?
excerpt: We have an employee that has left the company. We deactivated him but is there a way to mass reassign all of his active items, across numerous boards and workspaces, to another person?

posts.author: jmlytleBMC (Jessica Lytle)
posts.cookedHtml: We have an employee that has left the company. We deactivated him but is there a way to mass reassign all of his active items, across numerous boards and workspaces, to another person?

posts.author: jyoung (Jamie Young)
posts.cookedHtml: Has this been answered? I have the same issue.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @jyoung,

You can use Toolkit Find and Replace feature for that.

image987×414 12.5 KB

image1165×597 14.1 KB

image1317×395 16.6 KB

Select Find and Replace from the left bar, select your boards and person columns and replace the user with the new user in the next step. Simple as that.

If you have any questions, you can reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: Hollywood_Jeff (Jeff Peri)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I am having the same issue. I chatted with tech support and they asked me to do an all search, but when I try to click on the checkboxes are grayed out and it says, " batch selection is currently unsupported in this view". It seems that it is a platform limitation to use batch action on “search everything”. It will only allow reassigning tasks one at a time. I looked up Toolkit, but I don’t think I should have to pay to do an operation that should be included. The data is there. It should be simple as a find and replace. I can only imagine that most businesses move around employees or replace employees for a variety of reasons. This needs to be addressed immediately.
